productDisplayName: Puma Men Wirko  Black Casual Shoes
description: puma has its roots in Germany, and the brand is known for its minimalistic design in high-end athletic shoes. A jogging and walking shoe, this puma Wirko is replete with features to enhance performance. Team this with performance clothes when hitting the track or the gym, or simply pair it with jeans and t-shirts. Upper Synthetic leather upper with contrast coloured synthetic overlays on the sides for durability and midfoot support Medial side overlay styled as brand's jumping cat to create a fashion statement Added overlay at the backfoot for durability and support Lace-up system for snug, customised Fit Padded tongue and fabric collar for in-step comfort and snug fit Midsole PU midsole for lightweight comfort, durability and impact protection Padded footbed for all-day comfort and shock absorption Outsole TPR outsole in exaggerated herringbone pattern for absolute grip and traction Terraced grooves on the toe region for added grip Mildly curved forefoot for better traction Puma branding and jumping cat as lugs on the midfoot for inner-arch support and grip Shoe care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
